name: Rob Stradling
why_notable: Built crt.sh — the PostgreSQL-backed search frontend over Certificate Transparency logs that turned CT data into a free, queryable, human-usable tool. Created it in 2015 when CT became mandatory for Chrome. Sectigo hosts it as a public service. For reconnaissance purposes, crt.sh is how you extract subdomains from CT logs without running your own log crawler — it's the tool that made CT data operationally accessible for the security community.
